parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field. Prefix - for descending. Allowed: id, transaction_date, type, reference, name, total, created_at, updated_at

parameters.name: filter[search]
parameters.description: Search by ID, reference, name, or integration invoice number override

parameters.name: filter[type]
parameters.description: Filter by type (comma-separated for multiple). Values: sales_order_invoice, purchase_order_invoice, credit_note, payment, etc.

parameters.name: filter[has_error]
parameters.description: yes | no — filter by presence of sync errors
